summary: Frontend testing of EditQuoteModal component refactoring completed successfully. All 7 features tested and verified working - Edit Quote Modal opens when clicking Edit on approved quotes, displays quote information correctly, close button (X) works, products section shows editable quantities, discount mode toggle (Total vs Per-Item) works with Apply to All button, commercial terms dropdowns displayed with Payment Terms/Freight Terms/Color/Delivery options, and Save & Mail Revision button is visible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: EditQuoteModal component has been extracted from quotes.tsx (~844 lines). quotes.tsx is now 3607 lines. The component properly handles: discount mode switching (Total/Per-Item), editable product quantities, freight input, packing type selection (Standard/Pallet/Wooden Box/Custom), commercial terms dropdowns, summary calculations, and Save & Mail Revision functionality.

EDIT_QUOTE_MODAL_OPENS.details: Modal opens when clicking Edit button on approved quote in QuoteDetailModal

QUOTE_INFO_DISPLAY.details: Modal displays quote number, product name, unit price (Rs. 2024.94/unit), quantities, and totals correctly

CLOSE_BUTTON_X.details: X icon visible in top right corner of modal header - closes the modal

PRODUCTS_EDITABLE_QUANTITIES.details: Products section shows QTY input field for editing quantities, along with DISC %, AFTER DISC, and TOTAL columns

DISCOUNT_MODE_TOGGLE.details: Total Discount / Per-Item Discount toggle works - Per-Item mode shows Apply to All Items section with input and Apply to All button

COMMERCIAL_TERMS_DROPDOWNS.details: All commercial terms dropdowns displayed: Payment Terms (7 days credit), Freight Terms (FOR your site), Color/Finish (1+2+1 zinc rich primer), Delivery (90-95 working days). Also shows Warranty and Validity info.

SAVE_AND_MAIL_BUTTON.details: Save & Mail Revision button visible at bottom of modal with mail icon

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/per_item_mode.png - Per-Item Discount mode with Apply to All
